'''鈭歭-l-v''' ('''kalalav''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:localise|localise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-l-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:localise|localise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歭-l-v
|-
! Lemma
| kalalav
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thilalav|thilalav]] || [[word:jilalav|jilalav]] || [[word:shilalav|shilalav]] || [[word:kilalav|kilalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthulalav|thuthulalav]] || [[word:jujulalav|jujulalav]] || [[word:shushulalav|shushulalav]] || [[word:kukulalav|kukulalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thulalav|thulalav]] || [[word:julalav|julalav]] || [[word:shulalav|shulalav]] || [[word:kulalav|kulalav]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thulalav|thulalav]] || [[word:julalav|julalav]] || [[word:shulalav|shulalav]] || [[word:kulalav|kulalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thelalav|thelalav]] || [[word:jelalav|jelalav]] || [[word:shelalav|shelalav]] || [[word:kelalav|kelalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thotholalav|thotholalav]] || [[word:jojolalav|jojolalav]] || [[word:shosholalav|shosholalav]] || [[word:kokolalav|kokolalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:tholalav|tholalav]] || [[word:jolalav|jolalav]] || [[word:sholalav|sholalav]] || [[word:kolalav|kolalav]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:tholalav|tholalav]] || [[word:jolalav|jolalav]] || [[word:sholalav|sholalav]] || [[word:kolalav|kolalav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]] || [[word:lalav|lalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙lalav|th忙lalav]] || [[word:j忙lalav|j忙lalav]] || [[word:sh忙lalav|sh忙lalav]] || [[word:k忙lalav|k忙lalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathalalav|thathalalav]] || [[word:jajalalav|jajalalav]] || [[word:shashalalav|shashalalav]] || [[word:kakalalav|kakalalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thalalav|thalalav]] || [[word:jalalav|jalalav]] || [[word:shalalav|shalalav]] || [[word:kalalav|kalalav]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thalalav|thalalav]] || [[word:jalalav|jalalav]] || [[word:shalalav|shalalav]] || [[word:kalalav|kalalav]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shalalav|shalalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshalalav|goshalalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishalalav|gokishalalav]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shalalavn眉|shalalavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshalalavnkn眉|goshalalavnkn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalavn眉|gokishalalavn眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shalalavsh毛|shalalavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshalalavnksh毛|goshalalavnksh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishalalavsh毛|gokishalalavsh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalavro|shalalavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalavnkro|goshalalavnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalavro|gokishalalavro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalavmu|shalalavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalavnkmu|goshalalavnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalavmu|gokishalalavmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shalalavsher|shalalavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshalalavnksher|goshalalavnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishalalavsher|gokishalalavsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shalalavng|shalalavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshalalavnkng|goshalalavnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishalalavng|gokishalalavng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shalalavya|shalalavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshalalavnkya|goshalalavnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishalalavya|gokishalalavya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shalalavyam|shalalavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshalalavnkyam|goshalalavnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishalalavyam|gokishalalavyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalalavn眉sh毛|shalalavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalalavnkn眉sh毛|goshalalavnkn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalalavn眉sh毛|gokishalalavn眉sh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalavn眉ro|shalalavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalavnkn眉ro|goshalalavnkn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalavn眉ro|gokishalalavn眉ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalavn眉mu|shalalavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalavnkn眉mu|goshalalavnkn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalavn眉mu|gokishalalavn眉mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalalavsh毛n眉|shalalavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalalavnksh毛n眉|goshalalavnksh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalavsh毛n眉|gokishalalavsh毛n眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalavsh毛ro|shalalavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalavnksh毛ro|goshalalavnksh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalavsh毛ro|gokishalalavsh毛ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalavsh毛mu|shalalavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalavnksh毛mu|goshalalavnksh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalavsh毛mu|gokishalalavsh毛mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalalavron眉|shalalavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalalavnkron眉|goshalalavnkron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalavron眉|gokishalalavron眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalalavrosh毛|shalalavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalalavnkrosh毛|goshalalavnkrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalalavrosh毛|gokishalalavrosh毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shalalavromu|shalalavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshalalavnkromu|goshalalavnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishalalavromu|gokishalalavromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shalalavmun眉|shalalavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshalalavnkmun眉|goshalalavnkmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishalalavmun眉|gokishalalavmun眉]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shalalavmush毛|shalalavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshalalavnkmush毛|goshalalavnkmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishalalavmush毛|gokishalalavmush毛]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shalalavmuro|shalalavmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshalalavnkmuro|goshalalavnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishalalavmuro|gokishalalavmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==

{{wordpage|a3ddb2a}}
